location: Picked up from a corpse inside a ruined building at Woodfolk Ruins, east of the Minor Erdtree in Altus Plateau.
tactics: Woodfolk Ruins is patrolled by worm-like cultist enemies (Wormfaces) that ambush from underground — approach carefully rather than walking straight through.
The shield sits on a corpse inside the northernmost ruined building; it's often possible to dash in, grab it, and retreat without a full fight.
A separate underground chamber beneath the ruins (guarded by more Wormfaces) leads to a chest with the Wrath of Gold incantation — don't confuse that pickup with this one.
lore: A shield painted with a devotional scene and blessed by a tear from the Erdtree, evoking the golden age when the Erdtree's blessing was abundant. The painted invocation itself acts as a standing prayer, slowly mending its bearer's wounds.

builds.name: Sustain tank
builds.why: Passive 3 HP/second regeneration is a flat bonus that doesn't scale with upgrades but stacks with other healing sources, supporting a self-sustaining turtle playstyle.

builds.name: Early greatshield pickup
builds.why: Only 22 Strength to wield one-handed, making full-block viable well before most other greatshields are accessible.
